Full configuration [can be overridden using environment variables or command line arguments]:
    version-major: 25
    version-minor: 10
    version-patch: 0
    version-suffix: (unconfigured)
    plugin-linked-into-llvm: false
    plugin-llvm-version-major: 0
    plugin-with-cpu-acceleration: false
    plugin-with-sscp-compiler: false
    default-clang: (unconfigured)
    default-targets: omp
    default-cpu-cxx: clang++
    default-rocm-path: /opt/rocm
    default-use-bootstrap-mode: false
    default-is-dryrun: false
    default-use-accelerated-cpu: false
    default-clang-include-path: (unconfigured)
    default-sequential-link-line: /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
    default-sequential-cxx-flags: -D_ENABLE_EXTENDED_ALIGNED_STORAGE
    default-omp-link-line: -Xclang -fopenmp /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
    default-omp-cxx-flags: -I/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/include -Xclang -fopenmp -D_ENABLE_EXTENDED_ALIGNED_STORAGE
    default-is-explicit-multipass: false
    default-save-temps: false

    default-nvcxx: (unconfigured)
    default-cuda-path: /opt/cuda
    default-cuda-link-line: -Wl,-rpath=$ACPP_CUDA_LIB_PATH -L$ACPP_CUDA_LIB_PATH -lcudart
    default-cuda-cxx-flags: -U__FLOAT128__ -U__SIZEOF_FLOAT128__ -isystem $ACPP_PATH/include/AdaptiveCpp/hipSYCL/std/hiplike
    default-rocm-path: /opt/rocm
    default-rocm-link-line: -Wl,-rpath=$ACPP_ROCM_PATH/lib -Wl,-rpath=$ACPP_ROCM_PATH/hip/lib -L/opt/rocm/lib -L/opt/rocm/hip/lib -lamdhip64
    default-rocm-cxx-flags: -isystem $ACPP_PATH/include/AdaptiveCpp/hipSYCL/std/hiplike -isystem /usr/lib/llvm20/lib/clang/20/include/.. -U__FLOAT128__ -U__SIZEOF_FLOAT128__ -I$ACPP_ROCM_PATH/include -I$ACPP_ROCM_PATH/include --rocm-device-lib-path=$ACPP_ROCM_PATH/amdgcn/bitcode --rocm-path=$ACPP_ROCM_PATH -fhip-new-launch-api -mllvm -amdgpu-early-inline-all=true -mllvm -amdgpu-function-calls=false -D__HIP_ROCclr__

    default-clang: /usr/lib/llvm20/bin/clang++
    default-targets: generic
    default-cpu-cxx: /usr/lib/llvm20/bin/clang++
    default-use-bootstrap-mode: false
    default-is-dryrun: false
    default-use-accelerated-cpu: true
    default-clang-include-path: /usr/lib/llvm20/lib/clang/20/include/..
    default-sequential-link-line: (unconfigured)
    default-sequential-cxx-flags: -D_ENABLE_EXTENDED_ALIGNED_STORAGE
    default-omp-link-line: -fopenmp
    default-omp-cxx-flags: -fopenmp -D_ENABLE_EXTENDED_ALIGNED_STORAGE
